message:
fix(tui): palette caching, contrast tuning, and rendering optimizations

- Cache TuiThemePalette per-thread with generation counter to skip
  redundant normalized_for_contrast() on every frame
- Raise decorative border contrast floors (MIN_DECORATIVE 1.35->2.0,
  border ratios widened) so separators remain visible across themes
- Use panel_title_fg for border_style so title text has readable
  contrast independent of decorative border dimming
- Skip Arc allocation + mutex lock in tick event batching when no
  new events arrived
- Skip ambient health mutex computation when ambient effects are off
- Avoid double-paint flash on cache-miss frames by only clearing
  base surface when ambient renderer will not overwrite it
- Fix Ctrl+C in search to reset state locally instead of executing
  a no-op search query
- Fix dashboard summary tiles: use Block::new().borders() to avoid
  Sides::all(1) padding that shrinks inner area at compact heights
- Fix test schema drift: projects.created_at INTEGER, messages
  include project_id/recipients_json, file_reservations include
  agent_id, tool_metrics pre-select row, markdown large-body test
  uses paragraph-separating double newlines
- Use in-memory DB in dynamic_palette_adds_message_entries test to
  avoid real DB data saturating the message cap

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2674,6 +2674,7 @@ mod tests {
             "CREATE TABLE file_reservations (
                 id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
                 project_id INTEGER,
+                agent_id INTEGER,
                 path_pattern TEXT,
                 \"exclusive\" INTEGER,
                 created_ts INTEGER,
